message:
Command `# Fixed! Now restart DRT.
DESIGN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup /home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    "$DESIGN_DIR/config.json" \
    --flow Classic \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane DRT PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid

sleep 60
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
tail -10 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
echo "---"
# Check for DRT progress
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | head -2` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Fixed! Now restart DRT.
DESIGN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup /home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    "$DESIGN_DIR/config.json" \
    --flow Classic \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane DRT PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid

sleep 60
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
tail -10 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
echo "---"
# Check for DRT progress
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | head -2
